page_content:
Prerequisite: Completion of at least 7 RDEV courses.

Restriction: Permission of ARCH-Real Estate Development.

Credit Only Granted for. RDEV688I or RDEV690.

Formerly: RDEV688I.

RELS - Religious Studies

RELS408 Capstone Seminar for Religions of the Ancient Middle East (3 Credits)

A capstone seminar for majors in Religions of the Ancient Middle

East, designed to provide the intellectual framework for a substantial, interdisciplinary research project. Course topics will be thematic and students will be encouraged to explore comparative or interdisciplinary approaches.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
